response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with ~15 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the role is a Director-level Principal IC focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, deep cloud expertise, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers — none of which are evident in the resume. AI experience is recent and limited; no advanced degree, no track record of shaping cloud/AI strategy at scale.
strengths: ~15 years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev) and community teaching/workshop experience
concerns: No demonstrated AI products/platforms or recognized AI expertise expected at Principal/Director level
Limited cloud-strategy depth — AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is tactical, not strategic/architectural at scale
No evidence of advising strategic customers or operating as a Director-level IC influencing org-wide direction

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / shipped AI platforms
Seniority mismatch — Senior/Staff IC vs. Director-level Principal
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure
